bundles.title: Extract Watch Launcher CLI
bundles.goal: Introduce a standalone specflow-launch-watch CLI that preserves the existing launch contract while removing fragile inline shell dispatch from templates.

tasks.title: Implement the CLI entrypoint, empty-target pass-through, git-root cwd resolution, and always-exit-0 behavior.
Port the 12-branch launcher dispatcher to child_process spawn and spawnSync, using argv-based invocation everywhere except the osascript and xfce4-terminal string branches.
Centralize quoting for osascript and xfce4-terminal, preserve the Japanese manual hint, and emit exactly one WATCH_METHOD line using the basename form for TERMINAL.
Register the new binary in the package bin map and add unit coverage for dispatcher selection, cwd fallback, and stdout contract preservation.

bundles.title: Add Template Positional-Arg Lint
bundles.goal: Fail builds before template resolution when command templates embed forbidden positional placeholders inside fenced bash or sh blocks.

tasks.title: Implement line-by-line fenced-block scanning for bash and sh sections and detect $1 through $9 plus $ARGUMENTS against raw template line numbers.
Wire lint execution into src/build.ts before resolveAllTemplates so failures use the existing build error path and point at raw template locations.
Add targeted tests for valid text fences, rejected bash placeholders, and escaped examples that should still build.

bundles.title: Delegate Watch Launch From Templates
bundles.goal: Replace inline launch_watch helpers in both slash-command templates with CLI delegation while preserving runtime fallback behavior.

tasks.title: Replace the Step 3 inline launcher in specflow.md.tmpl with a specflow-launch-watch RUN_ID call and a missing-binary manual fallback.
Replace the Step 2 inline launcher in specflow.watch.md.tmpl with the matching specflow-launch-watch WATCH_TARGET delegation and fallback.
Regenerate the resolved Claude command files so the shipped command bodies no longer contain launch_watch definitions.

bundles.title: Lock In Regression Coverage
bundles.goal: Add regression checks and verification steps that prove the auto-launch fix and template-authoring guard remain intact.

tasks.title: Add regression assertions that regenerated specflow command bodies invoke specflow-launch-watch and never embed a launch_watch function.
Run build and test verification for the launcher contract, template regeneration, and positional-arg lint enforcement.
Complete the macOS Terminal.app smoke check for auto-launch from specflow and record any follow-up fixes if the reported watch method diverges.
